telegraph_text: Trump orders Department of War to resume US nuclear weapons testing 'on an equal basis' with other countries.
Supreme Court hears landmark case on legality of Trump's tariff authority; outcome could void presidential tariff powers.
Trump orders DOJ probe into majority foreign-owned meatpacking firms for beef price-fixing and collusion.
Trump warns Supreme Court tariff case could force unwind exceeding $3 trillion, signaling legal risk to entire tariff regime.
Government shutdown nearing resolution as Democrats 'crack'; Trump orders air traffic controllers back to work amid aviation disruption.
Trump promotes active US-brokered Russia-Ukraine peace talks, citing Nobel nomination and ongoing negotiations to end the war
Nvidia's Huang touts US Blackwell chip production starting, crediting Trump tariffs for AI re-industrialization push
Trump demands single federal AI standard preempting state regulation to protect AI investment growth engine
US-brokered Russia-Ukraine peace plan advancing; 28-point framework fine-tuned, both sides reportedly nearing agreement on ending war
Trump-Xi call yields China trade deal on soybeans, farm products, fentanyl; relationship described as extremely strong
Trump announces permanent pause on migration from all Third World countries and terminating Biden-era admissions
Trump declares Venezuelan airspace closed in its entirety amid escalating US anti-drug military pressure on Venezuela
Trump holds productive call with Brazil's Lula discussing tariffs and rolling back sanctions on Brazilian officials
Trump authorizes NVIDIA to ship H200 chips to approved China customers, with 25% paid to US; Xi responded positively.
Trump warns Supreme Court tariff ruling looms as major threat; case seen as direct, fast tariff mechanism at risk.
US blockades sanctioned oil tankers and surrounds Venezuela with largest armada, demanding return of oil and assets, escalating military pressure.
Trump touts tariffs cutting trade deficit by half; Supreme Court ruling on tariff legality pending.
Q3 GDP reported at 4.3%, far above ~3.2% expectations, with administration touting strong growth and low inflation.
US military strikes against ISIS in Syria and northwest Nigeria, retaliation for killings of Americans and Christians.
Trump threatens US military intervention in Iran if regime kills protesters; 'locked and loaded and ready to go.'
Trump hosts Putin call and Zelenskyy meeting at Mar-a-Lago pushing Ukraine peace deal; cites Russian obstruction.
US military strike captures Maduro; regime change in Venezuela, US controls 30-50M barrels sanctioned oil and seizes tankers, oil majors meet White House
Trump publicly attacks defense contractors (Raytheon named) over buybacks/dividends while raising 2027 military budget to $1.5 trillion
Supreme Court tariff ruling pending; Trump touts $600B tariff revenue ahead of decision
Trump imposes 25% secondary tariff on any country doing business with Iran, amid Iran unrest and warnings to regime
US-Venezuela partnership post-intervention; calls with interim president on oil, minerals, trade; prisoner releases and stabilization
Low inflation/strong GDP (~5%) data released; Trump pressures Powell for meaningful rate cuts; mortgage rates fall via Fannie/Freddie bond buying
Trump and NATO form framework deal over Greenland/Arctic control, citing China-Russia threat; meetings at Davos advancing 'Golden Dome' plan.
Trump sues JPMorgan and CEO Dimon for $5B over alleged political debanking, escalating attacks on major bank.
Trump touts mortgage rates at three-year low, attacks Powell; tariff litigation pending at Supreme Court.
US carrier armada led by USS Abraham Lincoln moving toward Iran, threatening imminent military action with 'speed and violence'.
Trump nominates Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve Chairman after publicly attacking Powell over refusal to cut rates.
US decertifies all Canadian-made Bombardier aircraft amid escalating Trump threats over Canada-China trade deal.
Trump holds calls with Xi (confirming April China trip, trade, Taiwan) and Modi, who agrees to stop buying Russian oil and buy US energy
US bolsters Middle East forces while Trump signals openness to Iran nuclear deal; diplomacy weighed amid rising tensions
Trump welcomes China, India investment in Venezuela oil; signals deals with Cuba, easing sanctions posture
US deploys second aircraft carrier to Middle East as Iran nuclear negotiations continue per Netanyahu meeting; Mideast tensions building.
Venezuela rapprochement: US dealing with Rodriguez government, oil 'starting to flow,' sanctions easing implied.
Trump escalates tariff threats against Canada and demands Republicans uphold tariffs; pressure for Fed rate cuts after strong jobs report.
Supreme Court rules against Trump's IEEPA tariffs, finding he lacks authority to impose them; Trump threatens trade cutoffs instead.
US-Japan trade deal launches with first investments under $550B Japanese commitment to invest in US.
Trump escalates attacks on Fed Chair Powell demanding lower rates, warns of renewed government shutdown risk.
Supreme Court strikes down Trump's tariff method; Trump signs new global 10% tariff on all countries and threatens higher tariffs on noncompliant nations
Trump escalates rhetoric on potential war with Iran, denying reports his top general opposes military action
Anthropic restricts US military use of its AI; Trump publicly threatens the company and FTC targets Apple over alleged news bias
US-Israel war on Iran: Khamenei killed, Iranian navy/air defenses destroyed, Trump demands unconditional surrender, mass evacuations of Americans from Middle East.
Trump orders US DFC to provide political-risk insurance for all maritime trade, especially energy, transiting the Gulf.
Defense manufacturers agree to quadruple production of advanced weaponry; munitions buildup amid sustained war footing.
Active US-Iran war: strikes on Iranian mine-laying boats, Hormuz threats, regime/navy/air force being destroyed, oil supply at risk
Trump publicly demands Fed Chair Powell cut interest rates immediately, not waiting for next meeting
Energy push: first new US oil refinery in 50 years ($300B Brownsville), quadrupled defense weapons production, reshored manufacturing
US bombs Iran's Kharg Island oil terminal and military targets; Iran threatens Hormuz closure, prompting multinational naval escort effort and Israeli strike on South Pars gas field.
Strait of Hormuz transit threatened amid Iran conflict; NATO/European allies decline to help reopen passage, raising oil-price pressure.
Supreme Court ruling adverse to Trump tariffs, putting trillions in tariff revenue and trade policy in doubt.
US-Iran war: Trump claims Iran militarily decimated, threatens to obliterate Iranian power plants unless Strait of Hormuz fully reopened
Trump pauses Iranian energy-plant destruction 10 days to April 6 as ceasefire/deal negotiations proceed; Strait of Hormuz at issue
Government funding standoff over ICE/immigration; Trump pushes Senate to terminate filibuster; Xi summit rescheduled to May
US military strikes Iran, destroying targets, bridges, infrastructure; regime change underway with ceasefire talks contingent on reopening Strait of Hormuz
Strait of Hormuz blockage disrupting jet fuel/oil supply; Trump urges allies to seize it and threatens to 'take the oil'
US military strikes Iran (Operation Epic Fury), claims regime change; conflict centers on forcing reopening of Strait of Hormuz oil transit
Iran allegedly charging/restricting tanker passage through Hormuz despite ceasefire; Trump threatens renewed action, disputes oil flow normalization
Trump orders immediate 50% tariff on all goods from any country supplying military weapons to Iran, no exemptions
US Navy begins naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz/Iranian ports after Iran refused nuclear terms; tankers diverted, mines reported.
Iran agrees to fully reopen Strait of Hormuz and remove sea mines; blockade lifted except Iran-specific; nuclear deal nearing completion.
US-brokered 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire begins; first formal talks since 1983, Hezbollah pressed to stand down.
US naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz amid Iran war; Navy ordered to sink mine-laying boats; ceasefire violated, attack paused for Pakistan-brokered talks
Supreme Court tariff ruling reportedly requires US to refund $159 billion in collected tariffs to companies
Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended three weeks following Oval Office meeting with both parties
Iran declares 'state of collapse,' asks US to reopen Strait of Hormuz; nuclear deal talks stall amid Iranian leadership chaos
Trump to raise tariffs on EU cars and trucks to 25% next week, citing EU non-compliance with trade deal
US reviewing reduction of troops in Germany; pressure on Berlin over Iran and Russia/Ukraine policy
US military campaign against Iran with Strait of Hormuz blockade ('Epic Fury'); destroyers under fire, ships locked up, ceasefire/deal pending.
Trump announces three-day Russia-Ukraine ceasefire (May 9-11) with suspension of all kinetic operations.
US to withdraw thousands of troops from Germany, mulls pulling forces from Spain and Italy.
Iran war ongoing; Trump rejects Iranian negotiators' response as 'totally unacceptable,' disputes claims Iran faring well militarily
Trump leads major US business delegation (incl. Nvidia's Jensen Huang) to China to meet Xi, signaling trade engagement
Supreme Court tariff decision disputed; Trump laments adverse ruling potentially forcing $159B in refunds
US military strike on Iran scheduled then paused at Gulf states' request; Trump issues surrender ultimatums amid claimed destruction of Iran's navy/air force.
US to send additional 5,000 troops to Poland, escalating NATO eastern-flank posture.
Active US-Iran war and ceasefire/surrender negotiations; Trump demands nuclear concessions and unrestricted, toll-free Strait of Hormuz shipping with mine-clearing underway.
US presses EU to honor its trade deal with Trump; ambassador warns compliance required.
Trump touts US as crypto capital, sets CFTC as exclusive authority over prediction markets and crypto rules.
Iran war winding down: continuous US-Iran negotiations toward a nuclear deal, plus Trump-brokered Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire halting Beirut raid.
Trump names FHFA/Fannie-Freddie chairman William Pulte as Acting Director of National Intelligence while keeping housing-finance role.
Strong jobs report released; Trump publicly pressures markets and Fed, arguing stocks should rise and growth isn't inflationary.
US-Iran military conflict escalates: Iran downed a US Apache over Strait of Hormuz; US threatens strikes, then cancels them after a claimed deal.
US Navy blockade chokes Iran's commerce while US-escorted convoys push 100M+ barrels through Strait of Hormuz; Trump threatens seizing Kharg oil infrastructure.
